name: OXBRIDGE RE HOLDINGS Ltd
business: Oxbridge Re Holdings Ltd is a Cayman Islands specialty property and casualty reinsurer that provides reinsurance solutions through its reinsurance subsidiaries, Oxbridge Reinsurance Limited and Oxbridge Re NS. It focuses on underwriting fully collateralized reinsurance contracts primarily for property and casualty insurance companies in the Gulf Coast region of the United States, with an emphasis on Florida. Additionally, its subsidiary SurancePlus Inc. develops, offers, and sells tokenized reinsurance securities representing fractionalized interests in reinsurance contracts, and intends to expand into tokenization of other real-world assets.
sellsTo: property and casualty insurance companies in the Gulf Coast region of the United States, with an emphasis on Florida
accredited investors in the United States under SEC Rule 506(c) and non-U.S. persons under Regulation S

exposures.sentence: We are a Cayman Islands specialty property and casualty reinsurer that provides reinsurance solutions through our reinsurance subsidiaries, Oxbridge Reinsurance Limited and Oxbridge Re NS.

In addition to our historical reinsurance business operations, in 2023, our subsidiary SurancePlus Inc. began developing, offering, and selling a tokenized reinsurance security representing fractionalized interests in reinsurance contracts.

catalysts.sentence: The Note has a 6-month maturity, with the outstanding principal and interest due and payable on August 14, 2026, unless repaid earlier.

catalysts.event: Release of approximately $5 million collateral cash and intended repayment of promissory note
catalysts.sentence: We intend to pay the promissory note in June 2026 after the expected release of approximately $5 million of our collateral cash held in trust account in June 2026, following the end of a successful 2025/26 treaty period.

catalysts.event: Launch of T42:2027 and T20:2027 tokenized reinsurance securities
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, SurancePlus launched its high yield and balanced yield tokens for the 2026/27 treaty year under the names T42:2027 and T20:2027.

tamClaims.claim: The RWA asset tokenization market is projected to reach $16.1 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The Boston Consulting Group published research projecting the RWA asset tokenization market to reach $16.1 trillion by 2030.
